title: Section 62A Planning Application: S62A/2025/0111 11-13 Whiteladies Road, Clifton, Bristol, BS8 1PB
body: "Type of application:  Full Planning Application and for relevant demolition of an unlisted building in a conservation area  Applicant name:  Urban Creation (11-13WLR) Ltd  Site address:  11-13 Whiteladies Road, Clifton, Bristol BS8 1PB  Description of proposed development:  Demolition of the rear annexe and delivery of 4 mews houses for short-term let with associated landscaping and other works.  Case Officer:  Section 62A Applications Team  Procedure:   Written Representations  Key dates:      Date     Date application valid 1 July 2025   Date by when representations must be made 4 August 2025   Hearing date and venue NA   Target Decision 26 August 2025   Decision date 8 August 2025     Decision   Statement of Reasons and Decision Notice  (PDF, 178 KB, 7 pages)   Make a representation  The application can be inspected under the application plans and documents heading below.  You will be able to comment on this application until 4 August 2025.  Please base your comments on planning matters.  Please avoid the use of inflammatory, discriminatory or abusive comments  All representations made in connection with the development proposal will be made publicly available on the website shortly after the end of the representation period.  The name of the individual author or organisation will be published however addresses, signatures and contact details will not be published.  We advise you not to include any other personal information about yourself or others. Our Customer Privacy Notice sets out how we handle personal data in accordance with the law.  Send your comments via email to  section62anonmajor@planninginspectorate.gov.uk  or write to Section 62A Applications Team, Planning Inspectorate, 3rd Floor, Temple Quay House, 2 The Square, Temple Quay, Bristol, BS1 6PN  Sending comments by email will enable us to deal with them more quickly.  Please include the application reference number S62A/2025/0111 and site address.  This application will be determined by an Inspector appointed by the Secretary of State.  Shortly after the close of the representation period the Planning Inspectorate will consider whether a hearing is necessary.   In the event that a hearing is scheduled, and you would wish to speak at the hearing, you must make this request at the time you submit your written representations.  Where the application is to be considered at a hearing, notice of the date, time and venue for the hearing along with the name of the person holding the hearing, will be published on this website at least one week before the date of the hearing.   Application Plans and Documents     Application Form Final  (PDF, 5.48 MB, 14 pages)  11-13 WLR Annexe Full App  (PDF, 2.57 MB, 22 pages)  2131 400-Location Plan  (PDF, 236 KB, 1 page)  2131 401-Existing Site Plan  (PDF, 262 KB, 1 page)  2131 402-Floor Plans  (PDF, 466 KB, 1 page)  2131 403-Elevations  (PDF, 526 KB, 1 page)  2131 404-Proposed Site Plan  (PDF, 450 KB, 1 page)  2131 405-Section and Garden Store  (PDF, 405 KB, 1 page)  2131 HDAS 2025-06-13  (PDF, 16.9 MB, 11 pages)  2131 Waste Statement - Mews Houses  (PDF, 494 KB, 3 pages)  BNG Exemption Statement  (PDF, 179 KB, 4 pages)  CIL Form  (PDF, 489 KB, 6 pages)   Questionnaire and...
